issues.description: Card has two distinct effects but effects array is empty. Effect 1: Conditional cost reduction (−3 cost) when DON!! imbalance condition is met. Effect 2: Blocker keyword with Counter trigger. DSL must include both effects.
Missing first effect: cost reduction trigger. Should activate during hand state when DON count difference meets condition (opponent's DON - your DON >= 2). Action: PowerBoost with −3 cost modifier.
Missing second effect: Blocker mechanic. Should trigger on Counter when opponent attacks, allowing this card to rest and become new attack target.
